visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with a fuzzy patterned hat and pink sweater stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, excitedly pointing at stacks of yellow boxes of instant noodles. The background consists of tall industrial shelves filled with various bulk products under bright fluorescent lighting. (2) Close-ups show the product packaging and a price tag. The woman holds a box, displaying various facial expressions of anticipation and interest. (3) The scene shifts to a bright indoor kitchen and living room area. The woman, now in a white top and black beret, unboxes the noodles, revealing several seasoning and ingredient pouches. (4) Close-up shots depict the noodles being cooked in a pan on a stove. Steam rises as the woman uses pink tongs to stir the broth and inspect small chunks of meat. (5) Two women sit at a table, each with a bowl of noodles. They use chopsticks to lift and eat the noodles, discussing the product with animated gestures and varied expressions from curiosity to slight disappointment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 能贏花雕雞? [Slogan]: 台酒 陳紹雞肉麵. (2) [Variety]: 新的. [Variety]: 聽起來很好吃. (3) [Slogan]: 255元. (4) [Slogan]: 窯藏20年. (5) [Variety]: 這個回去試看看. (6) [Slogan]: 每包42.5. (7) [Slogan]: 雞肉調理包. [Slogan]: 紹興酒. [Slogan]: 很大塊的麵. (8) [Variety]: 油油的包. (9) [Variety]: 小塊小塊的. (10) [Variety]: 全家福. [Variety]: 垃圾桶裡相聚. (11) [Variety]: 三小塊. (12) [Slogan]: 雞肉跟花雕雞比比較少. (13) [Slogan]: 湯頭配麵. [Variety]: QQ捲捲. [Variety]: 彈口彈牙. (14) [Slogan]: 加7塊錢吃花雕雞. [Slogan]: 49塊的花雕雞麵. (15) [Variety]: 不止20年. [Variety]: 應該50年.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, 1 co-host in the final segment
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator is a young woman wearing a fuzzy hat and pink sweater initially, then a black beret and white sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse with high shelves and bulk goods; then a modern apartment interior with a kitchen and living room.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic female voice speaking rapidly over a bright, upbeat electronic pop track. Her tone is high-pitched and excited. (2) A clear metallic 'ding' SFX coincides with the presentation of product prices, followed by a series of pop sound effects. (3) The acoustic texture shifts as sounds of bubbling liquid and rhythmic stirring with utensils become audible over the continuous music. The speaker's voice maintains high arousal as she describes the cooking process. (4) Wet slurping sounds and the clinking of ceramic bowls mark the tasting phase. A second female voice joins in, contributing to a conversational review dynamic. (5) A final comedic cartoon 'boing' sound effect ends the track as the speaker delivers a humorous closing remark.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Discovery -> Unboxing -> Cooking -> Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and compare the new TTL Aged Shaoxing Wine Chicken Noodles from Costco with existing products, evaluating value for money and flavor profile.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While the product is showcased, the creator provides an honest critique regarding the small amount of meat.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of variety-show style text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement during a product review.
